statcast_watch: Kodai Senga gets the ball for New York Mets against Chicago Cubs at 2:20 PM ET and has touched 99.2 mph; has generated a healthy 25.2% whiff rate on swings, making him one of the stronger Statcast pitching signals on tonight’s board.
Edward Cabrera gets the ball for Chicago Cubs against New York Mets at 2:20 PM ET and has touched 98.7 mph, making him one of the stronger Statcast pitching signals on tonight’s board.

Chris Bassitt is set to start for Baltimore Orioles versus Cleveland Guardians at 6:10 PM ET, and his recent Statcast sample covers 286 pitches, giving this matchup a measurable pitching signal to watch.

Baltimore Orioles at Cleveland Guardians (6:10 PM ET) draws attention with Chris Bassitt lined up against Tanner Bibee, making starting pitching the clearest early storyline.
Atlanta Braves at Philadelphia Phillies (6:40 PM ET) stands out behind a probable starters matchup of Martín Pérez and Taijuan Walker.
